headline: Assembly Biosciences Reports Year-End 2025 Financial Results and Recent Highlights
summary: – Successfully licensed helicase-primase inhibitor program for recurrent genital herpes to Gilead, including candidates ABI-5366 and ABI-1179, following positive Phase 1b interim data; development plan anticipated by mid-2026 – – Phase 2 initiation for ABI-6250, an oral small-molecule entry inhibitor candidate for chronic hepatitis delta virus, anticipated by end of 2026 – SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO, Calif., March 19, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Assembly Biosciences, Inc. headline: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Gilead Sciences, Inc. (GILD) is a Trending Stock
summary: Recently, Zacks.com users have been paying close attention to Gilead (GILD). This makes it worthwhile to examine what the stock has in store.

headline: A Look At Gilead Sciences (GILD) Valuation As Recent Returns Send Mixed Signals
summary: What recent performance says about Gilead Sciences (GILD) With no single news headline setting the tone, Gilead Sciences (GILD) has still given investors plenty to think about, as the share price and fundamentals paint a mixed, data rich picture. Over the past month the stock shows a return of about a 9% decline, while the past 3 months reflect roughly a 16% gain and the 1 year total return sits near 35%. Longer term shareholders see very large gains, with total returns around 101% over 3...
